'''Krinemonen III''' was an [[Ocean/Legends|oceanic]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Krinemonen]]. It served as a stronghold of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

The moon supported a ring of shipyards which manufactured cruisers, the medium-sized [[MC30a light cruiser]] and [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]]. Ships based on designs that were modified from stolen [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]] [[Strike-class medium cruiser]] schematics. It also served as a refuge world for aquatic beings such as [[Priapulin]]s and [[Iyra]] which were seeking asylum from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]].<ref name="Strongholds" />
